01

Produce Management

Managing multiple grades and bulk produce was inconsistent

⚠️

Problem

Handling multiple grades, bulk quantities, and sorting processes lacked standardization — every batch was handled differently.

⚙️

Solution

Implemented a structured produce management system with defined grading parameters, consistent workflows, and clear documentation.

📈

Impact

Improved grading consistency, reduced handling errors, and significantly better quality control across every produce batch.

elCatalogs — Produce Management Dashboard

Live system · elCatalogs platform

02

Rate Management

Daily price fluctuations made rate updates inefficient

⚠️

Problem

Cardamom prices change daily, making manual updates slow, error-prone, and unreliable — creating friction with customers.

⚙️

Solution

Automated system to fetch grade-wise daily rates and share instantly across all channels, eliminating manual intervention.

📈

Impact

Accurate real-time pricing across all grades, significantly improved customer trust, and faster deal closures.

03

Customer Management

Customer communication and follow-ups were unstructured

⚠️

Problem

No centralised system for tracking customer interactions, follow-ups, or deal stages — leads slipped through the gaps constantly.

⚙️

Solution

Deployed a CRM with pipeline tracking, WhatsApp integration, automated follow-up triggers, lead flow automation, and team activity visibility.

📈

Impact

Faster follow-ups, zero missed leads, full conversation history, and measurable improvement in conversion rate.

CRM Communications — Customer Pipeline

Live system · elCRM platform

04

Workforce Management

There was no visibility into team performance

⚠️

Problem

Unable to track field staff activity or internal team productivity — accountability was impossible without visibility.

⚙️

Solution

Introduced a tracking system with individual performance reports, activity monitoring, and weekly output summaries.

📈

Impact

Improved accountability across the team, data-driven performance evaluation, and clear identification of top performers.

05

Order Management

Handling local and international orders was chaotic

⚠️

Problem

Managing domestic and export orders across different formats, currencies, and compliance requirements lacked any unified structure.

⚙️

Solution

Built a unified order management system supporting international workflows, multi-currency orders, and export documentation.

📈

Impact

Simplified operations across markets, smoother global trade handling, and reduced order processing time significantly.

06

Inventory Management

Stock and warehouse operations lacked control

⚠️

Problem

Difficulties tracking stock updates, warehouse transfers, and compliance processes caused delays and invisible losses.

⚙️

Solution

Implemented a real-time inventory system with transfer tracking, grade-wise stock views, and compliance documentation.

📈

Impact

Better stock visibility across warehouses, efficient movement tracking, and audit-ready documentation at any point.

elInventory — Stock & Warehouse Dashboard

Live system · elInventory platform

07

Retail Operations

Retail operations consumed too much manual effort

⚠️

Problem

The team was handling retail manually — taking orders, coordinating delivery, updating stock — all limiting focus on wholesale growth.

⚙️

Solution

Launched a dedicated e-commerce platform to automate retail sales, order processing, and customer-facing operations end to end.

📈

Impact

Dramatically reduced team workload on retail, enabling sharper focus on high-value wholesale relationships and business development.

08

Brand Visibility

Lack of digital presence affected credibility

⚠️

Problem

No strong online presence meant customers couldn't verify credibility — hampering trust-building with new leads and international buyers.

⚙️

Solution

Developed a professional website that clearly communicates expertise, grading standards, and market positioning to global visitors.

📈

Impact

Improved brand authority, faster trust-building with new customers, and a credible foundation for global market expansion.

The Outcome

Eight problems.
One connected system.

From fragmented, manual operations to a fully integrated trading platform — built for scale, speed, and global reach.
